nasb.text: Does a lion roar in the forest when he has no prey? Does a young lion growl from his den unless he has captured something?

esv.text: Does a lion roar in the forest, when he has no prey? Does a young lion cry out from his den, if he has taken nothing?

cnv.text: 獅子如果不是捕獲獵物， 怎會在林中吼叫？ 少壯獅子如果沒有捕獲甚麼， 怎會在洞中咆哮呢？

ccb.text: 若非捕到猎物， 狮子怎会在林中咆哮呢？ 若非猎获食物， 猛狮怎会在洞中吼叫呢？
